title: Canadian Chronic Disease Indicators (CCDI) - Open Government Portal
content:
## Canadian Chronic Disease Indicators (CCDI)
The Canadian Chronic Disease Indicators (CCDI) provide information on chronic diseases, their determinants, and their risk and protective factors in Canada. Pan-Canadian estimates, time trends and data breakdowns by demographic and socioeconomic variables are provided for each indicator and their specific measures.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Public Health Agency of Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Canadian Chronic Disease Indicators (CCDI) CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Indicateurs des maladies chroniques au Canada (IMCC) CSV French dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
